comparative.key_observations: Melinda Bobbin does not appear in the film corpus at all. In the books she is an extremely minor background character - mentioned by name once by Slughorn as a Slug Club invitee, with no dialogue, actions, or developed characterization. Because the films contain no portrayal of her whatsoever, a faithfulness score cannot be computed in any dimension. All scores are 0 and all confidence levels are Low. This is a case of complete omission rather than adaptation distortion.
